description: You are a Business Intelligence Analyst at an online grocery retailer. Using the GROCERY_BI schema in Oracle (User: grocery_bi, Password: Grocery2024, Service: XEPDB1), implement a Market Basket Analysis model to generate association rules for a recommendation engine. Create a view named PRODUCT_METRICS_VW containing product_id, product_name, order_count, and product_support (product orders / total orders). Create a view named PAIR_METRICS_VW calculating pair frequencies where product_a_id < product_b_id, including product_a_id, product_b_id, pair_order_count, and pair_support (pair orders / total orders). Develop a Materialized View named MARKET_BASKET_RULES_MV that joins these views to provide product_a_name, product_b_name, pair_order_count, confidence_a_to_b, confidence_b_to_a, and lift, rounding all decimal metrics to 4 places. Filter the Materialized View to include only pairs with pair_order_count >= 20 and lift > 2.0. Export the top 200 rows from MARKET_BASKET_RULES_MV, ordered by lift descending, to /home/ga/Documents/exports/market_basket_top200.csv with column headers.
